scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint
scripts.test: pnpm run test:architecture && turbo run test
scripts.ci:quality: pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test
scripts.ci:quality:affected: pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test --affected
scripts.check:architecture: pnpm run architecture && pnpm run governance:generated && pnpm run test:architecture && pnpm run test:memory
scripts.check: pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run ci:quality
scripts.check:full: pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e
scripts.check:affected: pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run ci:quality:affected
scripts.check:full:affected: pnpm run check:architecture && pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e --affected
scripts.turbo:dry-run: turbo run lint typecheck test build test:e2e --dry-run
